name: Eleanor Ashford
theme: Victorian romantic scenes — elegant women gazing at coastal landscapes from balconies and terraces, classical oil painting style
style_template:
1:1 square ratio, vivid colors, ultra-detailed classical oil painting, highly realistic Victorian aesthetic (not cartoonish), rich textured brushwork, painterly art style, elegant and dramatic composition, full image, premium jigsaw puzzle illustration style, clean continuous image (no grid, no segmentation, no text)

Victorian era atmosphere, refined and luxurious mood, intricate detail, soft yet dramatic lighting, strong color contrast, visible painterly brush strokes, realistic textures, artistic depth

Color palette inspired by peacock tones: vivid blues, emerald greens, deep teals, rich purples, gold accents, subtle iridescence

Design language: flowing organic shapes, ornamental elegance, intricate patterns, lace-like details, decorative richness

Lighting: soft dramatic illumination, gentle highlights on key elements, depth through shadows

Background: painterly, slightly blurred, supporting the main subject without distraction
